data.title: What's Going On With Viking Therapeutics, Structure Therapeutics Stock On Monday?
data.description: Pfizer ends danuglipron development after liver safety issue, boosting shares of Viking, Eli Lilly, and Novo Nordisk amid obesity drug competition.

MP Materials, The Metals Company Shares Are Moving Higher Monday: Here's Why
data.description: Metals and mining companies including MP Materials Corp (NYSE:MP) and The Metals Company Inc (NASDAQ:TMC) are moving sharply higher Monday morning following reports that the Trump administration plans to stockpile deep-sea metals to counter China.

data.title: Bank Stocks Rebound Above 200-Day Average As Earnings Propel Dip Buyers
